text: I was thinking about that design we discussed last time.
The memory system architecture? Yeah, what about it?
I finally figured out why the synthesis layer wasn't working!
The issue was the prompt structure — we were mixing first-person and third-person framing.
That makes so much sense. God, we spent three days on that.
Anyway, want to grab coffee later?
Wait, did you see that the deployment broke production?
What?? No — when did this happen?
